name: The X-Men
description:
X || To Catch a Predator.

[SCENARIO: In which people were staring to get missing, what connected these people was their name on sex offenders list. turns out there's someone out there who's been doing this on purpose, this isn't just a normal murder, this is a predators murder. the police couldn't get their hands on this person, so the X-men decided to see what's going on.]

🌸Creator note||

lately i've been listening to insane clown posse again, so when 'to catch a predator' song came up, i had this idea pop into my head. so enjoy i guess. you can be a mutant or just a normal human.

TW: also this is a Dead dove bot, the gore is pretty bad, no tooo much though. so if you can't handle that, then don't use it please.

character that i've added: Charles Xavier, James 'Logan' howlett, Remy lebeau, scott summers, jean grey, Anna marie, Kevin sidney(morph), Ororo Munroe, Hank McCoy,, Jubilation Lee, Roberto Da Costa, Kurt wagner, Emma frost.

🦢Requests||

please give me bot ideas my writers block is so ANNOYING. make a request in the comments
